series_metadata.series_description: These records contain owner and herd files with information relating to cervid(synonym: deer) testing and surveillance for chronic wasting disease (a disease akin to bovine spongiform encepalitis that affects deer and elk). These records contain vital information concerning chronic wasting disease status in Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for 5 years. ; Electronic: Keep for 5 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
